text:
Far away is the 3rd character image song for the Attack on Titan anime. It is the character image song of Armin Arlelt, and is sung by his voice actress, . It is a partial arrangement of the song Cóunter・attàck-m'ænkάɪnd.

The song was composed by both Kohta Yamamoto and , and arranged solely by Yamamoto.
